description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-container` (T3-59). Layout wrapper — implied in all systems.

Review `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-container/`.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, size prop typing (sm/md/lg/xl/full), padding prop, alignment prop
2. Accessibility — purely presentational, but must not introduce landmark confusion or break reading order, axe-core pass
3. Tests — all sizes render correct max-width, padding variants, full-width mode, content slot
4. Storybook — all size variants, with content demo
5. CSS — max-width values use `--hx-*` tokens (not hardcoded px), responsive padding, center alignment, CSS parts
6. Performance — bundle < 2KB (it's a layout primitive)
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable, wraps page content

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-container/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-container — T3-59 antagonistic quality review
